headline: Launch surfaces now settle down faster after the first real interaction, while support prompts wait until the reading flow is deeper.
notes: Lets the top launch surface calm down after a short dwell or the user’s first meaningful interaction, so the opening screens feel quieter without removing build context.
Delays the floating Send note action until the user is deeper into the page, reducing support-layer overlap during the first reading moment.
Keeps the existing support and build paths intact while making the initial product surface feel more editorial and less operational.
